0.text: Nodular density in the apical segment of the upper lobe of the right lung, 13x5 mm in the peripheral area

1.text: Linear density increases around the nodular density in the right lung apex

2.text: Scarring in the right lung apex

3.text: Linear atelectasis in both lungs, more prominently in the lower lobes

5.text: Subcentimeter nonspecific nodules in both lungs
